message: A young knight named Rudolf Ruleman with his sleepy horse, Snoozy, encountered a castle. In one of the balconies there was a princess.

choices.text: Get inside and ask her to marry him

message: He knocked on the door and an old man dressed as the buttler opened.
-I am Knight Rudolf Ruleman from the Ruleman City and I want to marry the princess.
-Sure, take this paper and when your number comes you can speak with the king.
Inside the lobby, there were 72 other knights. Some were sharpening their swords, others were combing their hair, and some others were doing push-ups.

choices.text: Paint his face with small purple dots

message: -Cowards, I'm challenging you all to fight me!
-What are you waiting for! Come and prove what you are worth!
Suddenly, one big and bulky knight stood up and got closer to Rudolf. Without saying a word, he grabbed him by the neck and threw him outside the window. He lands:

choices.text: At a big gold-feather dragon that happend to fly below the window

message: Knight Rudolf then painted small purple dots on his face and started coughing and shivering. Another knight next to him, worried, asked him:
-Nothing. Just that I suffer from an extremely rare and contagious disease
-Its called Eggplantitisis, where your face turns purple, your nose transforms into an eggplant and your mouth becomes an eggplant salad.
As soon as he said that, all the other 72 knights rushed to the exit freightened. The butler called the next person
